title: Alberta to dismantle current patient-care model, create new health delivery system
author: Janet French
notes: AHS dismantled into 4 entities: acute care (retains AHS name), primary care, continuing care, mental health/addictions. Budget: $85M over 2 years. Prior to announcement, leaked documents said govt planned to sell CapitalCare and Carewest — Smith denied. AFL president: 'plan to eviscerate our public health-care system.' Upgrades EVT-060 from govt page (R-074) to Tier 2. Note: R-074 updated separately.
